effectStyleHandoff.disposition: Create or reconcile as a local Figma effect style after variable import QA
Create or reconcile as a local Figma effect style after variable import QA
Create or reconcile as a local Figma effect style after variable import QA
Create or reconcile as a local Figma effect style after variable import QA

figma.applicationOrder: collections, variables, aliases, supported scope assignments, code syntax, then per-family binding QA; omit BOOLEAN scope assignment

mappings.styleSelection: Use the appropriate registered Noto Sans Arabic style for the semantic text style; the family variable stores only the family name.
Select Condensed ExtraBold on Noto Sans Arabic in the Arabic Industrial text style; Condensed is a style, not a separate registered family.
Use the appropriate non-condensed registered Noto Sans Arabic style for compact UI; UI is a web-stack role, not a registered Figma family.
Select weight and style in the consuming Figma text style; the family variable stores only the family name.
Select weight and style in the consuming Figma text style; the family variable stores only the family name.
Select weight and style in the consuming Figma text style; the family variable stores only the family name.
Use ExtraBold for Industrial H3 and Bold for Industrial H4; the existing working local text styles establish the Display family for this industrial role.

mappingContract.aliasStrategy: Preserve resolvable cross-collection aliases and retain an honest resolved Figma value for audit
mappingContract.booleanScopeStrategy: Retain the intended conceptual scope separately, omit scope assignment because Figma rejects it for BOOLEAN, and record the live API report of ALL_SCOPES
mappingContract.descriptionStrategy: Use canonical token $description verbatim when present; otherwise identify the governed source token and preserve publication authority
mappingContract.fontFamilyStrategy: Keep canonical WEB stacks unchanged; resolve each Figma FONT_FAMILY value through the governed live-registry mapping artifact and select condensed/display distinctions in text styles when Figma registers them as styles or separate families.
mappingContract.legacyApertureSemantics: notch and chamfer are forbidden; use the current governed Continuous Lens tokens only
mappingContract.modeStrategy: Modes contains 27 variables with five values each; never flatten to 135 variables
mappingContract.primitiveScopes: Palette and Brand use [] so semantic consumers remain the preferred pickers
mappingContract.variableName: Replace token-path dots with slashes without changing spelling or case

title: Bizarre Industries Figma Canonical Variable Import Plan
